nodes.name: Friendly bush warbler
nodes.summary: Friendly bush warbler（Locustella accentor）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Friendly bush warbler。

nodes.name: Friendly bush warbler
nodes.summary: The friendly bush warbler (Locustella accentor), also known as the Kinabalu friendly warbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo. References

nodes.name: Locustella
nodes.summary: Locustella（Locustella）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联23种鸟类，如矛斑蝗莺、Bamboo warbler、River warbler等23种鸟类。
